description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push and pull request events with a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress jobs for the same workflow and event. Use a matrix strategy to build and test on multiple Linux distributions (alpine, archlinux, debian, fedora, opensuse, gentoo) with C++20 standard. For each job, run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a container image based on the distribution, check out the code, configure the build with meson, build with ninja, and run tests with make.
